name: Hide
description: Make a Dexterity (Stealth) check to try to become hidden from enemies.

name: Search
description: Make a Wisdom (Perception) or Intelligence (Investigation) check to find something hidden nearby.

name: Study
description: Make an Intelligence (Arcana, History, Nature, or Religion) check to recall or deduce information about something.

name: Utilize
description: Use a non-magical object or interact with something in the environment, such as opening a door or drinking a potion.

name: Influence
description: Make a Charisma (Deception, Intimidation, Performance, or Persuasion) check to alter a creature's attitude.

name: Cast Ritual Spell
description: Cast a spell with the Ritual tag. This takes 10 minutes longer than normal but does not expend a spell slot.
